name: pod-crashloop-signal

query_condition.sql: SELECT count(*) AS total FROM "pods" WHERE body LIKE '%panic:%' OR body LIKE '%FATAL%' OR body LIKE '%OOMKilled%' OR body LIKE '%CrashLoopBackOff%' OR body LIKE '%segmentation fault%'

description: Kubernetes crash/panic/OOM signals in pod logs (>=10 in 5m).
